description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a low stone or concrete fence, featuring a flat green roof and a spacious yard. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a small porch and a set of steps leading up to the main door. A rectangular swimming pool is situated in the backyard, aligned parallel to the house, and there is a driveway leading to a covered carport on one side. Large windows are distributed across the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is landscaped with a well-maintained lawn and paved walkways connecting the entrance, driveway, and pool area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and functional modern aesthetics.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a fenced yard, front porch, carport, and backyard pool, featuring large windows and clean architectural lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, steps, and the pool in the backyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, carport, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, carport, and the driveway gate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, backyard, and the side elevation of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
